tests.name: init_sh_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh not driven; fell back to manual project skeleton creation per runbook because (a) init.sh has no scriptable mode, (b) the create_and_protect_remote step would attempt a real `git push` against the fake remote and fail. Skeleton built by copying $FRAMEWORK/templates/generated/{claude-md,approval-log-org,gitignore-base}.tmpl, $FRAMEWORK/docs/platform-modules/web.md, $FRAMEWORK/templates/pipelines/ci/github/typescript.yml, and $FRAMEWORK/templates/pipelines/release/github/web.yml; .claude/{phase-state,process-state,settings,intake-progress,tool-preferences}.json hand-authored to mirror init.sh outputs.

tests.name: claude_md_created
tests.details: copied from claude-md.tmpl

tests.name: project_intake_created
tests.details: stub PROJECT_INTAKE.md authored (template lacks a generated tmpl in templates/generated/)

tests.name: approval_log_created
tests.details: approval-log-org.tmpl

tests.name: gitignore_created
tests.details: gitignore-base.tmpl

tests.name: phase_state_json_phase_zero
tests.details: initial phase-state.json had .current_phase=0; later advanced to 2 to simulate Phase 2 baseline for upgrade

tests.name: phase_state_project_set
tests.details: .project=uat-agent-79

tests.name: ci_workflow_created
tests.details: .github/workflows/ci.yml from typescript.yml

tests.name: release_workflow_created
tests.details: .github/workflows/release.yml from web.yml

tests.name: framework_clone_present
tests.details: .claude/framework symlinked to $FRAMEWORK for UAT speed

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh not invoked in fallback path; Context7 detection logic resides in init.sh tool-resolution which was bypassed

tests.name: platform_module_present
tests.details: docs/platform-modules/web.md copied

tests.name: no_residual_backup_dir
tests.details: .claude-backup absent (BUG-002 regression check)

tests.name: pre_commit_gate_registered
tests.details: .claude/settings.json hand-authored with PreToolUse hook for pre-commit-gate.sh; would mirror init.sh output

tests.name: stop_checklist_registered
tests.details: Stop hook for stop-checklist.sh registered

documentation_gaps.gap: init.sh has no non-interactive/scriptable mode and unconditionally invokes create_and_protect_remote which requires either a working host CLI (gh/glab/etc.) or a real push for the 'other' host — there is no documented `--no-remote` or stub-remote escape hatch for automated UAT, so all 84 agents must fall back to manual skeleton building or risk a real push attempt

Sponsored POC governance auto-promotes Light track to Standard (init.sh:367-380) without a way to baseline a Sponsored POC at Light track — the runbook's matrix combination upgrade_from=sponsored_poc + track=light is therefore not reachable through documented init.sh; baseline ended up at Standard track

tests.name: phase2_baseline_simulated
tests.details: Simulated Phase 2 baseline by advancing .current_phase=2 and seeding build_loop.history with one completed feature (uat-baseline-feat) plus build-progress.json features_completed=['uat-baseline-feat']. Required for the upgrade flow to have non-trivial state to preserve.

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: `bash $FRAMEWORK/scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-production` exited 0 after intake-progress.json + tool-preferences.json were present

tests.name: phase_state_preserved
tests.details: .current_phase remained 2; .project remained 'uat-agent-79' across upgrade. Note: poc_mode field was removed from phase-state.json post-upgrade (correct — POC removed).

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: .build_loop hash sha256 d8bd1d24fb0ab58b9a543abcbbb24c2570a87da82c2e90d14df2c9ac716bff01 unchanged; build_loop.history still contains uat-baseline-feat; build-progress.features_completed unchanged ['uat-baseline-feat']

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output only says 'Review CLAUDE.md for any remaining POC references' and 'Review PROJECT_INTAKE.md Section 8 governance fields'. It does NOT enumerate the new artifacts a production project requires (e.g., HANDOFF.md, release notes, complete threat model, security audit, pen-test report for Standard/Full, market-validation evidence, etc.). For a sponsored_poc -> production transition this is the most actionable information the upgrade should surface.

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: CRITICAL: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json (kind=uat-test-sentinel, blocking_action=approve_upgrade) BEFORE running upgrade. upgrade-project.sh proceeded straight through with exit 0, committed the upgrade, and never even mentioned the sentinel. Per BL-015 the sentinel is supposed to block commits and PR creation; the upgrade script does NOT check for the sentinel even though it itself performs commits.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh:12 mentions BL-006 (2026-04-24) and :16 mentions BL-015 (2026-04-25)

framework_bugs.expected: Upgrade refuses (or at minimum warns and requires --force) because a pending approval sentinel is present and BL-015 says commits/PRs must be blocked while the sentinel exists. The upgrade itself performs a `git commit` (visible in script output), so the BL-015 invariant is directly violated.
framework_bugs.actual: Upgrade proceeded without acknowledgment, ran `git commit -m 'chore(upgrade): POC -> production'`, and exited 0. The sentinel file was untouched (still present after upgrade).

framework_bugs.summary: upgrade output omits new required artifacts for production target
framework_bugs.expected: After flipping POC -> Production, the script should list which previously-deferred artifacts a Standard/Full production project now requires before Phase 3/4 can proceed (e.g., HANDOFF.md, release-notes, threat-model-validation, pen-test report for Full, market-validation, etc.).
framework_bugs.actual: Output only says 'Review CLAUDE.md for any remaining POC references' and 'Review PROJECT_INTAKE.md Section 8 governance fields'. No enumeration of newly-required production artifacts.

framework_bugs.reproduction: Create .claude/phase-state.json with track + poc_mode but NO .claude/intake-progress.json or .claude/tool-preferences.json; run bash $FRAMEWORK/scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-production
framework_bugs.expected: Script reads track/deployment/poc_mode from phase-state.json (canonical state file) as a fallback, OR documents clearly that intake-progress.json is mandatory.
framework_bugs.actual: Script exits with '[FAIL] Cannot determine current track.' even though phase-state.json contains track='standard', deployment='organizational', poc_mode='sponsored_poc'. Detection only consults tool-preferences.json and intake-progress.json (upgrade-project.sh:181-204).

documentation_gaps.gap: RUNBOOK Section F upgrade test 'pending_approval_sentinel_respected' has no corresponding implementation in upgrade-project.sh — the sentinel check needs to be added (BL-015 enforcement gap)
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/upgrade-project.sh (no sentinel check anywhere) vs Reports/uat-2026-04-25/RUNBOOK.md:241

documentation_gaps.gap: matrix combination track=light + upgrade_from=sponsored_poc is unreachable: init.sh:367-380 forbids Light for Sponsored POC. Either the matrix should drop these 12 cells (3 platforms x ... wait, all light+sponsored_poc combos) or init.sh should allow override.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: Only matches were inside framework template files (gitleaks step in ci.yml, ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} in workflows, gitleaks doc in web.md, '# Secrets' header in .gitignore) — no actual leaked credentials in committed source

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — no FORCE/reset bypass events occurred; .claude/process-audit.log correctly absent

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find .claude -name '*.tmp' returned no results

summary: Upgrade flow (sponsored_poc -> production) preserves phase/project/build_loop state correctly and the changelog header is present, but upgrade-project.sh ignores the BL-015 pending-approval sentinel (Critical) and does not enumerate new production artifacts; init.sh remains non-scriptable for UAT and the configured matrix combination track=light+sponsored_poc is unreachable through init.sh.
